title: Your Throne Forever

sections.label: Intro
lines: Generate a soft, subtle track with smooth transitions.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: The Lord declares, “Come, sit at My right hand,
Until all foes beneath your feet shall stand.”
A scepter of might extends from Zion’s throne,
Rule amidst the nations, for they are your own.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Your people rise, in holy array,
As dawn’s dew renews the light of day.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You reign forever, exalted high,
Your throne endures, beneath heaven’s sky.
A priest forever, in mercy and might,
The King of glory, crowned in light.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The Lord has sworn, and it shall remain,
A priesthood eternal in Melchizedek’s name.
He stands as Judge, the nations shall bow,
In streams of justice, His grace flows now.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Lift your eyes to the mountain's crest,
The Lord of Hosts, your strength, your rest.
He reigns supreme, His victory known,
In Zion’s heart, He claims His throne.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You reign forever, exalted high,
Your throne endures, beneath heaven’s sky.
A priest forever, in mercy and might,
The King of glory, crowned in light.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Forever He reigns, our Savior, our King,
In endless praise, His name we sing.

epigraph: Sit thou at my right hand
